summary: MemPalace (48k stars) competitive analysis — validated continuous capture and MCP-first delivery as proven patterns.

content.learning: MemPalace solves a similar problem with different methods. Key takeaways adopted by MOM.

mempalace_approach.capture: Continuous via Claude Code hooks (Stop + PreCompact) — zero manual wrap-up needed
mempalace_approach.context_delivery: MCP-first — behavioral instructions embedded in tool responses, no static boot file

what_mom_adopted: Continuous raw capture via hooks (Stop + PreCompact) — zero friction
MCP fallback for runtimes without hooks
where_mom_differs: Memory types and lifecycle vs flat documents
Hierarchical scope (.mom/ walk-up) vs single store
Enterprise path (OFFICE) with ABAC and governance
